title: Principal Radiologist at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!
